title: turnType-schema
description: Unified turnType format. Applicable to both field_based and topic_based taskTypes.

turnType.description: ask=prompting user, reply=responding, complete=done, off-task=deviated, giveup=abandoned, validation_failed=value check failed

askingField.description: field_based: current field name (category/amount/time/quantity). validation_failed: failed field name. null otherwise.

changeLevel.description: Change level for this turn. Applicable to both taskTypes. Invalid format defaults to minor.

changeLevelReason.description: Reason for change level. Required for major/minor (1-100 chars), optional for invalid. Empty/over-length -> DET format check intercept, default 'not provided' with warning.

message.description: Natural language response to user, max 30 chars.

collectedFields.description: Collected fields that changed this turn.

result.description: Complete structured result. Only when turnType='complete'.
